title: Freelance Service Tier Pricing Architecture Swipe File
description: Provides freelance consultants and creatives with 10 real-structure examples of three-tier service packaging so they can anchor client choices and increase average project value.
gumroad_description:
STOP leaving money on the table by offering "cheap, standard, premium" tiers that confuse clients instead of guiding them.

This swipe file gives you 17 real-world three-tier pricing structures from actual freelance consultants and creatives who've already figured out what works. You'll see exactly how they anchor choices, stack value, and push clients toward higher-ticket projects without feeling pushy.

WHO THIS IS FOR

— Design and branding consultants tired of scope creep and low-ball inquiries
— Content strategists and copywriters who want predictable pricing conversations
— Digital product creators and course designers who need packaging frameworks that sell

WHAT'S INSIDE

— 17 copy-ready tier examples you can adapt in minutes, not hours
— Real pricing logic explained so you understand *why* each structure works
— JSON + Markdown formats ready to drop into your proposals or website
— Usage notes for deploying each template based on your service type

Stop guessing. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
